IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE ORGANIZATION'S MISSION IS TO CONSERVE WILDLIFE AND WILDERNESS LANDS; TO EDUCATE THE YOUTH AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC AND TO PROMOTE AND PROTECT THE RIGHTS AND INTERESTS OF HUNTERS WORLDWIDE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE ORGANIZATION'S MISSION IS TO CONSERVE WILDLIFE AND WILDERNESS LANDS; TO EDUCATE THE YOUTH AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC AND TO PROMOTE AND PROTECT THE RIGHTS AND INTERESTS OF HUNTERS WORLDWIDE.
IRS990.Desc: THE ORGANIZATION PROVIDES GRANTS TO FURTHER ITS MISSION OF WILDLIFECONSERVATION, EDUCATION AND HUNTER ADVOCACY. APPROXIMATELY 44% OF THEGRANTS GO TOWARD CONSERVATION, 36% FOR EDUCATION AND 20% FOR HUNTERADVOCACY. ABOUT TWO THIRD OF THE GRANTS SUPPORT PROJECTS BEYOND TEXASBORDERS. EXAMPLES INCLUDE CONSERVATION INITIATIVES FOR LIONS, ELEPHANTS, GIRAFFES, AND LEOPARDS, DEVELOPING CONSERVATION STRATEGIES IN CANADA, AND ADVOCATING FOR HUNTER INTERESTS IN WASHINGTON D.C. THE REMAINDER OF THE GRANTS SUPPORT TEXAS INITIATIVES SUCH AS DESERT BIGHORN SHEEP RESTORATION, QUAIL HABITAT IMPROVEMENTS, MULE DEER RESEARCH AND EXPANDING CONSERVATION CURRICULUM.THE ORGANIZATION PUBLISHES THE FOLLOWING PUBLICATIONS SOLELY FOR THE ORGANIZATION'S MEMBERSHIP: GAME TRAILS MAGAZINE WHICH IS PUBLISHED QUARTERLY AND THE ORGANIZATION'S ONLINE NEWSLETTER.PROGRAM SERVICES FOR MEMBERS INCLUDING MONTHLY MEETINGS, GUEST SPEAKERS, COMPETITION EVENTS AND OPEN HOUSES.

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Food Service Management by MGR LLC

USAddress.AddressLine1Txt: 3240 S I-10 Service Rd W ST

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PART I, LINE 2, PROCEDURES FOR MONITORING THE USE OF GRANT FUNDS THE DALLAS SAFARI CLUB'S MISSION IS TO CONSERVE WILDLIFE AND WILDERNESS LANDS; TO EDUCATE YOUTH AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC AND TO PROMOTE AND PROTECT THE RIGHTS AND INTERESTS OF HUNTERS WORLDWIDE. AS PART OF THAT MISSION, THE DALLAS SAFARI CLUB OFFERS GRANT/FINANCIAL SUPPORT TO CAUSES IN THE USA AND ABROAD TO THOSE WHO SHARE THE SAME MISSION AND GOALS. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS APPROVE ALL GRANTS AND MONITOR HOW THE GRANT FUNDS ARE USED. ORGANIZATIONS RECEIVING GRANTS PERIODICALLY REPORT BACK TO THE DALLAS SAFARI CLUB REGARDING THEIR USE OF THE FUNDS RECEIVED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE TAX RETURN IS PREPARED BY AN INDEPENDENT CPA FIRM, REVIEWED AND SIGNEDBY THE TREASURER AND SUBMITTED TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR REVIEW ANDQUESTIONS PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS MEET ONCE PER MONTH AND ARE RESPONSIBLE FORMONITORING AND ENFORCING COMPLIANCE WITH THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE PROCESS FOR DETERMINING COMPENSATION INCLUDES USE OF OUTSIDE MARKETEVALUATION FIRM, THEN RECOMMENDATIONS ARE REVIEWED BY THE ADMIN COMMITTEE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL GOVERNING DOCUMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
